description: Configure the Chrome browser for a restaurant manager according to the standards in ~/Desktop/restaurant_browser_standard.txt. Reorganize the existing bookmarks into the five specified subject-area folders and the 'Personal - Previous Manager' folder. Create custom search engine shortcuts (sysco, recipe, safety), set the homepage and startup pages, configure the download directory, and adjust privacy/security settings as defined in the standard. Save a summary log of the configuration to ~/Desktop/browser_config_log.txt.
